<div style="--fade-in-animation: fade-in-new-response 150ms cubic-bezier(0.3,0,0.8,0.15); animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; padding-top: 30px; position: relative; opacity: 1; color: rgb(230, 232, 240); width: 652px; max-width: var(--CYi3c--fRcLaf,652px);"><div style="display: contents;"><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><div style="display: contents;">uv</div></strong><span>&nbsp;</span>is<span>&nbsp;</span><mark style="color: var(--jINu6c); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--jwFC2e); padding: 0px 2px; font-weight: 500;">an all-in-one Python project and package manager designed to be extremely fast and easy to use</mark>. Developed by<span>&nbsp;</span><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://astral.sh/blog/uv" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Astral</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>(the creators of the<span>&nbsp;</span><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://docs.astral.sh/ruff/" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Ruff</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>linter), it is written in Rust and serves as a single tool that can replace a wide array of traditional Python utilities including<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip-tools</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pipx</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">poetry</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pyenv</code>, and<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">virtualenv</code>.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 90.7031px;"><img id="img-QQm_adesDaPVkPIP3tX2gQU_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Astral Docs" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">Astral Docs</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+3</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Key Features<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Extreme Speed</strong>: It is typically<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">10–100x faster</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>than<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip</code><span>&nbsp;</span>and other traditional tools, especially when using its global dependency cache.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Unified Workflow</strong>: A single CLI manages everything from installing Python versions to managing virtual environments, locking dependencies, and publishing packages.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Python Version Management</strong>: It can download and install multiple Python versions automatically on demand, eliminating the need for separate tools like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pyenv</code>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Reproducible Builds</strong>: It uses a universal, cross-platform lockfile (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">uv.lock</code>) to ensure that project environments are identical across different machines and operating systems.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Tool Management</strong>: Similar to<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pipx</code>, it can run and install Python-based command-line tools in isolated, ephemeral environments using the<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">uvx</code><span>&nbsp;</span>command.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Drop-in Compatibility</strong>: It includes a<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">uv pip</code><span>&nbsp;</span>interface that acts as a high-performance replacement for standard<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip</code><span>&nbsp;</span>commands, allowing for easy migration of existing projects.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">requirements.txt</code>)</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Native lockfile</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">uv.lock</code>)</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Caching</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Basic per-environment caching</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Global cache</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(saves disk space)</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: none; min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Maturity</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: none; min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Battle-tested; bundled with Python</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: none; min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">Newer, but rapidly growing adoption</td></tr></tbody></table></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Key Differences<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Performance</strong>: uv uses parallel downloads and advanced dependency resolution to outperform pip by massive margins. For example, a "warm" installation (using cached data) can be over<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">100x faster</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>than pip.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Consolidation</strong>: To get a modern workflow with pip, you often need a "stack" of tools like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pyenv</code><span>&nbsp;</span>+<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">venv</code><span>&nbsp;</span>+<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip-tools</code><span>&nbsp;</span>+<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pipx</code>. uv replaces all of these with a single binary.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Reproducibility</strong>: pip installs what is requested at that moment, which can lead to "environment drift". uv generates a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">universal lockfile</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>that ensures every developer on a team—whether on Mac, Windows, or Linux—installs the exact same versions of every dependency.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Security</strong>: uv is generally considered more secure because it resolves dependencies without executing arbitrary code from the packages during the resolution phase.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 219.883px;"><img id="img-iR2_aaKvENLX5NoP7q350Ak_17" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Python Developer Tooling Handbook" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; Origins and Launch (Early 2024)<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">The Creator</strong>: uv was developed by<span>&nbsp;</span><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://astral.sh/" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Astral</a></span>, the company founded by<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Charlie Marsh</strong>, who previously created the ultra-fast Python linter<span>&nbsp;</span><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://astral.sh/ruff" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Ruff</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>in 2022.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Initial Release</strong>:<span>&nbsp;</span><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://astral.sh/blog/uv" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Astral announced uv</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>on<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">February 15, 2024</strong>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Initial Goal</strong>: At launch, it was primarily a high-performance<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">replacement for<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip</code><span>&nbsp;</span>and<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pip-tools</code></strong>. It focused on speed and resolving dependencies in Rust, often outperforming pip by 10–100x right from the start.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 76.1172px;"><img id="img-9R2_adqGIJvV5NoPzdGTsAc_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="astral.sh" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">astral.sh</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+6</span></span></div></button></span></span></li></ul><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">2. Strategic Stewardship (Late 2024)<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Rye Integration</strong>: Shortly after uv's launch, Astral took over the stewardship of<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Rye</strong>, another Rust-based Python tool created by Armin Ronacher. The teams decided to merge the best ideas from Rye into uv to create a single "Cargo for Python".</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Python-build-standalone</strong>: In late 2024, Astral took over the<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">python-build-standalone</span><span>&nbsp;</span>project from Gregory Szorc. This allowed uv to download and manage its own portable Python interpreters, removing the need for external tools like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">pyenv</code>.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 65.3359px;"><img id="img-9R2_adqGIJvV5NoPzdGTsAc_16" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Reddit" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">Reddit</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+5</span></span></div></button></span></span></li></ul><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">3. Transformation into a Project Manager (2024–2025)<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Unified Packaging</strong>: In<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">August 2024</strong>, Astral released a major update that transformed uv from a fast package installer into a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">unified project manager</strong>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Feature Expansion</strong>: This update added a cross-platform lockfile (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">uv.lock</code>), workspace support, and native Python version management.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Production Readiness</strong>: By<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">January 2025</strong>, uv reached a point of production-grade stability, seeing massive adoption across major open-source projects like<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">FastAPI</span><span>&nbsp;</span>and<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">Trio</span>.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 67.9844px;"><img id="img-9R2_adqGIJvV5NoPzdGTsAc_17" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="GitHub" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">4. Recent Milestones (2025–Present)<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Market Share</strong>: By mid-2025, reports indicated that uv accounted for roughly<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">12% of all PyPI download requests</strong>, a rare double-digit milestone for a non-pip installer.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px;
